title: linaria supina subsp. tristis
intro: Linaria supina subsp. tristis, also known as the somnolent toadflax, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Linaria supina subsp. tristis include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
